content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems can be repurposed to create self-improving DeepResearch Agents that automatically curate and prioritize which open research questions to explore next, rather than just answering pre-specified user queries. This memory architecture treats unresolved research ambiguities as high-value 'uncertainty spikes' to actively sample, mirroring how it stores and retrieves high-uncertainty interaction data for agent improvement.
